name: codex-security
description: Codex Security workflows for security scans, analysis, and investigation.

interface.longDescription: Codex Security packages reusable workflows for security scans, analysis, validation, and investigation across code, diffs, and related artifacts.
defaultPrompt: Run a Codex Security scan on this repository.
Run a Codex Security diff scan on this PR, commit, branch diff, or working-tree patch.
Triage existing security findings against this repository.
